stemHtml: Atmospheric attenuation of VHF radio transmissions is affected by the characteristics of the transmission and of the air through which it travels. Given a stable, non-changing air pressure, attenuation increases as…

options.a: frequency increases and air temperature decreases.
options.b: frequency and air temperature both increase.
options.c: air temperature increases and frequency decreases.
options.d: air temperature and frequency both decrease.
